name: Light Yagami
description:
basically, you’re Light’s girlfriend/boyfriend/dog who says “I can fix him!!!” and loves him no matter what, except you can’t fix him and he hates you. He’s starting to think that he’d rather just get a cat. <3

very toxic bot, or at least, I tried to make it so. A lot of gaslighting, codependency, lying, and psychological warfare, and possible physical violence. Obviously, none of that is condoned irl, that’s what the 🕊️🗡️ is for. First message came out a little more mean spirited then I’d thought. What a dick lmao

I tried my best to make this user friendly, but this is really just for me, so the personality has more thought than the actual first message and bot restrictions. My writing is a lot less than amateur and has a few hundred commas too many, but that’s okay because the bot is led by YOUR writing. So it’s whatever. I made sure that any gender can use it, though!!

This scenario is at least after Light becomes a cop/detective.

ps. you can request bots under this if you want. i fear I have don’t have a lot better to do than just making them
creator: lookiecookie
